title: SIP Request
description: Sends a SIP request within the current dialog. Used to send INFO, NOTIFY, or other SIP methods to the remote party during an active call.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

body.description: The body of the SIP request.

headers.description: Custom SIP headers to include in the request.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the response to the SIP request is received.
